data.name: HYPNOTIC EYES
data.detailed_description:
《HYPNOTIC EYES》——一款带有催眠、诱惑和黑暗欲望元素的变态视觉小说！🔥 主角凯托，一个普通的上班族，与性感的魅魔里蕾拉签订契约，获得催眠之眼，用来征服周围的美女们的意志。

                                 

在现代东京，住着一个普通家伙凯托——28岁的上班族，对日常感到疲惫：无尽的报告、严格的老板和完全没有个人生活。😩 但一切都改变了，当他遇到诱人的女魔里蕾拉——一个性感的魅魔，有角、尾巴和翅膀。

里蕾拉诱惑凯托，揭示他隐藏的欲望，并通过激情的亲密场景与他签订契约。作为回报，她赋予他眼睛中的催眠之力——一种神奇的目光，能影响周围的女性。现在凯托从女孩们那里收集性能量（欲望的精华）来滋养里蕾拉。每完成一个分支后，你将获得独特的奖励：与女魔的色情场景，作为你成功的“报告”！😘👀

                                 

  • 每个章节的动画H场景：从温柔浪漫到硬核支配和心灵控制！😍💦

  • 两条发展路径：Good（情感、爱 ❤️）或 Bad（腐败、控制 😈）。

  • 独特奖励：每个章节后与里蕾拉的火辣场景！🥵

  • 音乐：诱人的音乐来营造氛围。🎶

  • 艺术：时尚的CG图像用于亲密时刻。🎨

                                 

凯托 👨‍💼 ——28岁的疲惫上班族。害羞的独行者，压抑的幻想，成为催眠大师！

里蕾拉 👹💖 ——性感的魅魔，有白色头发、角和尾巴。以欲望为食，诱惑凯托并赋予他催眠之眼。你的恶魔导师和情人！

绫音 👧💕 ——24岁的可爱下级同事。纯真、善良、害羞的助手，爱好动漫和烘焙。

莉娜 🎀👗 ——22岁的活泼傲娇辣妹邻居学生。外表粗鲁，但内心恋爱。

樱 🏃‍♀️❤️ ——27岁的儿时朋友，健身教练。运动型、忠诚，但嫉妒的“小妹妹”。

准备好沉浸在催眠欲望的世界中了吗？将《HYPNOTIC EYES》添加到你的愿望清单中，开启你隐藏的幻想！😈👁️💕

data.short_description: 欢迎来到诱惑与秘密欲望的世界！《HYPNOTIC EYES》是一款绅士风格的色情视觉小说，在这里你的选择决定了角色的命运。沉浸在关于支配、催眠和激情的故事中，有两条发展路径：善或恶。
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 繁體中文, 簡體中文, 韓文, 俄文, 日文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7, 8, 10,11
  • 處理器: Intel Core i-3
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce GTX 650
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

data.name: HYPNOTIC EYES
data.detailed_description:
HYPNOTIC EYES — a hentai visual novel with elements of hypnosis, seduction, and dark desires! 🔥 The main character Kaito, an ordinary office clerk, makes a deal with the sexy succubus Rileyla and gains hypnotic eyes to subjugate the wills of the beauties around him.

                                 

In modern Tokyo lives an ordinary guy Kaito — a 28-year-old office clerk tired of the routine: endless reports, a strict boss, and a complete lack of personal life. 😩 But everything changes when he meets the seductive demoness Rileyla — a sexy succubus with horns, a tail, and wings. Rileyla seduces Kaito, revealing his hidden desires, and seals a contract with him through a passionate intimate scene. In exchange, she grants him the power of hypnosis in his eyes — a magical gaze that allows him to influence the women around him. Now Kaito collects sexual energy (the essence of lust) from girls to nourish Rileyla. After completing each branch, a unique reward awaits you: an erotic scene with the demoness as a "report" on your successes! 😘👀

                               

  • Animated H-scenes in every chapter: from tender romantic to hardcore domination and mind control! 😍💦

  • Two development paths: Good (emotions, love ❤️) or Bad (corruption, control 😈).

  • Unique rewards: Hot scenes with Rileyla after each chapter! 🥵

  • Music: Seductive tunes to create the atmosphere. 🎶

  • Art: Stylish CG images for intimate moments. 🎨

                               

Kaito 👨‍💼 — A 28-year-old tired office clerk. A shy loner with suppressed fantasies who becomes a master of hypnosis!

Rileyla 👹💖 — A sexy succubus with white hair, horns, and a tail. She feeds on lust, seduces Kaito, and grants him hypnotic eyes. Your demonic mentor and lover!

Ayane 👧💕 — A 24-year-old cute junior colleague. Innocent, kind, shy assistant with hobbies in anime and baking

Rina 🎀👗 — A 22-year-old vibrant tsundere-gyaru neighbor and student. Rough on the outside, but lovestruck inside.

Sakura 🏃‍♀️❤️ — A 27-year-old childhood friend and fitness trainer. Athletic, loyal, but jealous "little sister."

Ready to dive into the hypnotic world of desires? Add "HYPNOTIC EYES" to your wishlist and unlock your hidden fantasies! 😈👁️💕

data.short_description: Welcome to the world of temptation and hidden desires! "HYPNOTIC EYES" is an erotic visual novel in hentai style, where your choices determine the fate of the heroes. Immerse yourself in a story about domination, hypnosis, and passion, with two development paths: good or bad.
data.supported_languages: English, French, Traditional Chinese, Simplified Chinese, Korean, Russian, Japanese, Spanish - Spain

Minimum:

  • Processor: Intel Core i-3
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM

  • Storage: 1 GB available space
